zh.Efenechtid,,Denbighshire,Wales: 英國威爾斯丹比爾艾分丹德
zh.Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Prawst verch Elise於0940年出生在英國威爾斯尼德時，她的父親Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd55歲，母親Verch Aberfraw41歲。她於0977年與Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1035年在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年95歲。

zh-hans.Efenechtid,,Denbighshire,Wales: 英国威尔斯丹比爾艾分丹德
zh-hans.Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prawst verch Elise于0940年出生在英国威尔斯尼德时，她的父亲Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd55岁，母亲Verch Aberfraw41岁。她于0977年与Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1035年在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Elise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian and Spanish: from a Biblical personal name (Hebrew El ‘God’ + ish ‘save’; Greek Elisaios; ecclesiastic Latin Elisaeus; English Elisha ).

variants.name: Elisha
meanings: Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): from the personal name Elisha (1 Kings 19:16; 2 Kings 2-4), the name of a Biblical prophet who was the disciple and successor of Elijah .
English: variant of Ellershaw, a habitational name from Ellershaw in Bentham (Yorkshire), on the border with Lancashire. Its spelling has been infleuenced by the Old Testament name Elisha.
Welsh: from the personal name Elis(s)e, dialectally Elis(s)a and Elisha, also spelled Eliscia. The name was often further shortened to Elis. Compare Ellis .

nameMeanings.name: Prawst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: occupational name from Middle Low German pravest ‘provost’. See also Provost .
German: nickname for an ostentatious person, from Middle High German brast ‘pageantry, show, display’.
Austrian German: dialect form of   Propst  .

variants.name: Provost
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Andre, Emile, Camille, Lucien, Normand, Alphonse, Cecile, Gilles, Jacques.
French: northern and western variant of Prévost (see Prevost ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (compare 2 below).

English: occupational name from Middle English provost, provest, proust ‘provost, steward, representative’ (Old English prafost), also used for the head of a religious chapter or educational establishment, or, since such officials were usually clergy and celibate, a nickname for a self-important person.

en.lifeSummary: When Prawst verch Elise was born in 0940, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd, was 55 and her mother, Verch Aberfraw, was 41. She married Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth in 0977, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1035, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 95.

fr.Efenechtid,,Denbighshire,Wales: Efenechtyd, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prawst verch Elise est née en 0940, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Verch Aberfraw, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth en 0977, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1035, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prawst verch Elise 0940 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd 55 und ihre Mutter Verch Aberfraw 41. Sie hat 0977 in Wales Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1035 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prawst verch Elise è nata il nel 0940 nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Verch Aberfraw, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth nel 0977, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1035, nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Prawst verch Eliseが0940年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで生まれた時，父Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwyneddは55歳，母Verch Aberfrawは41歳であった。0977年にウェールズでPrince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1035年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Prawst verch Elise(이)가 0940년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Verch Aberfraw(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 0977년 웨일스에서 Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1035년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prawst verch Elise nasceu em 0940, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Verch Aberfraw, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth em 0977, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1035, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 95 anos.

ro.Efenechtid,,Denbighshire,Wales: Efenechtyd, Denbighshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prawst verch Elise родилась в 0940 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Verch Aberfraw, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth в 0977 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1035 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prawst verch Elise nació en 0940, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Verch Aberfraw, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth en 0977, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1035, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 95 años.
